title: Costa Azzurra
writer: Ottavio Alessi, Ugo Guerra, Vittorio Sala
actors: Alberto Sordi, Rita Gam, Antonio Cifariello
plot: Various short stories. Giovanna arrives from Rome with her husband Alberto for a film audition. The journalist Gino comes to interview the great industrial Signore Carsoli. The famous American actress Rita is in search of her umpt...
